overview: Polaris Rejuvenation specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for men and women, using hormones identical in structure to those naturally produced by the body. Treatment includes comprehensive evaluation, laboratory testing, progress monitoring, and lifestyle guidance.
highlights: Multiple delivery methods (injections, creams, gels, pellets)
Regular progress monitoring with follow-up lab assessments
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing age-related hormonal changes such as fatigue, reduced muscle mass, or mood fluctuations.
